injuries.comment: The Oilers said on Monday (Nov. 24) that Lazar will be out for at least another week, according to Tony Brar of Oilers TV.
The Oilers listed Walman as OUT for Tuesday's (Nov. 25) game against the Stars.
The Stars said on Wednesday (Nov. 19) that Lyubushkin will not join the team for their four-game road trip, per Lia Assimakopoulos of The Dallas Morning News.
The Stars said on Wednesday (Nov. 19) that Harley is week-to-week and will not join the team for their four-game road trip, per Lia Assimakopoulos of The Dallas Morning News.
